info.title: Recollectium Core Local Service API
info.description: Local-first HTTP JSON service contract for Recollectium Core. In v1, the service is localhost-first, has no authentication, and is not hardened as a public network service. Do not expose it publicly. Split-machine deployments should use private networking and external access controls.

parameters.name: verbosity

schema.description: Optional response verbosity override. Use compact for token-sensitive minimal payloads or verbose for full detail. Query value takes precedence over X-Recollectium-Verbosity.
schema.title: Verbosity
